title: Remove noisy approaching-stop advisory rule
hypothesis: APPROACHING_HARD_STOP should stop being generated because its executable replay was rejected and it adds LLM prompt noise.
scope: Map APPROACHING_HARD_STOP to 0% reduce if encountered by shared reduce helper.
Remove it from backtester exit-policy unreplayed advisory list.
non_goals: Do not change hard stop execution.
Do not add a replacement reduce/exit rule.
acceptance: Near-hard-stop prices no longer emit APPROACHING_HARD_STOP.
Shared reduce helper returns 0 for APPROACHING_HARD_STOP.
Default deterministic backtest metrics do not move.
